clients.description.authorizationGrantTy: Authorization grant types supported by this client
clients.description.clientAuthentication: Client authentication methods with the authorization server
clients.description.clientIdIssuedAt: Timestamp when the client ID was issued
clients.description.clientSecretExpiresA: Expiry timestamp of the client secret
clients.description.clientSettings: System field generated by the structured configuration form
clients.description.clientSecret.edit: Leave empty to keep the existing secret
clients.description.postLogoutRedirectUr: URIs to redirect to after logout, comma-separated
clients.description.redirectUris: Redirect URIs for the authorization flow, comma-separated
clients.description.scopes: OAuth2 scopes requested by the client
clients.description.tokenSettings: System field generated by the structured configuration form
clients.description.idTokenSignatureAlgo: Signature algorithm used when issuing ID Tokens
clients.description.tokenEndpointAuthent: Signature algorithm used for client JWT authentication
clients.error.missingId: The client record ID is missing
clients.description.requireAuthorization: Require the user to confirm requested scopes during first authorization
clients.description.reuseRefreshTokens: When disabled, each refresh issues a rotated refresh token
clients.description.accessTokenFormat: self-contained uses JWT; reference uses opaque reference tokens
clients.description.jwkSetUrl: Optional JWK Set URL used for client JWT authentication
clients.description.x509CertificateBound: Bind access tokens to the client certificate
